This field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: CONTRACT_ID_09 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: 5-digit alpha/numeric value 

COMMENT: To determine whether the Contract and Plan IDs in the data file for the reference year (year of the 
data file) represent the same plan in the prior year, compare this variable (along with the
